headline: Jim Cramer on Rocket Companies: “There’s Just Too Many Headwinds to Housing”
summary: Rocket Companies, Inc. (NYSE:RKT) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed. A caller asked if Cramer can see the stock redoubling once the housing market unfreezes, and he replied: No, I cannot. No, I can’t. There’s just too many headwinds to housing. I’d love to be more bullish. We own Home Depot for my […]

headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: Home Depot Delivery Tracker Aims To Deepen Pro Ties Despite Valuation Concerns
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has launched a real-time, GPS-enabled delivery tracker for big and bulky construction materials. The tool, aimed at Pro customers, extends live tracking capabilities previously available for large appliances. The new system is designed to cut downtime from uncertain delivery windows and support more predictable project scheduling. Home Depot, a major home improvement retailer with a large professional contractor base, is leaning further into services that support...
